defaults.hook_cover_term: a tight close up of Erling Haaland's face celebrating in a sky blue Manchester City jersey, his face filling the frame, sharp and clear

videos.video_subject: Real Madrid desperately wanted to sign Erling Haaland and saw him as their dream galactico striker, but Haaland turned down the biggest club in the world and chose to join Manchester City under Pep Guardiola instead
videos.video_script: Real Madrid wanted Haaland more than anyone. The dream signing. But he looked them in the eye and picked Manchester City instead. Which makes you wonder,
videos.video_terms: Erling Haaland Manchester City celebration close up, Erling Haaland Norway celebration, Erling Haaland running celebration, Erling Haaland calm reaction, Erling Haaland hat trick, Erling Haaland goal celebration, Erling Haaland close up face, Erling Haaland City blue jersey
